spanish: Es un cilindro que se deshace, se desenrolla y pues se desenrolla para usarlo.
english: It's a cylinder that dissolves, unrolls and well, it unrolls to use it.
explanation: Present subjunctive (use) in subordinate final clause introduced by 'para' - purpose clause expressing intention

spanish: Este tipo de objeto es muy útil para guardar cosas y que duren mucho tiempo.
english: This type of object is very useful for storing things so that they last a long time.
explanation: Present subjunctive (duren) after 'para que' - purpose clause expressing desired outcome

spanish: Aunque a veces también puede ser de goma, puede ser de goma y los golpes son más suaves.
english: Although sometimes it can also be made of rubber, it can be rubber and the blows are softer.
explanation: Present subjunctive (sea) after 'aunque' - concessive structure expressing possible alternative materials
